items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of pre-filling from previous submissions in the intake form. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or checks that confirm this functionality is implemented. The linked use case mentions the need for pre-filling but lacks specific evidence demonstrating that this feature is operational, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
